feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Price
entry.summary:
Author: dante0220

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 87,360Chapters: 58/?Kudos: 30

Summary: In the "Wicked Day", Merlin tries to save Uther's life. As Emrys, he tries to cast the healing spell. Unfortunately, Morgana's necklace contains an *extra* twist. As both healing spell and aging spell go wrong, Merlin is forced to flee. Kilgarrah takes him to safety. Mithian and Rodor grant him sanctuary. There Merlin realizes still more about his secondary royal destiny.

  • Major Character Death

entry.title: You and me, we've got (browser) history
entry.summary:
Author: liviapeleia

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,180Chapters: 27/?Kudos: 180

Summary: A season 1 canon divergent AU told through Reddit posts. Gaius and Uther are having a secret love affair. Somehow, Geoffrey might be involved. Arthur has more throwaway accounts than brain cells, Morgana is a SJW (affectionate), Gwen is the only sane person, and Merlin is absolutely not in love, no way, never. And how the hell does Kilgharrah's cave have WiFi?

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
  • Gaius/Uther Pendragon (Merlin)

entry.title: Shared Assets
entry.summary:
Author: Noel803

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,500Chapters: 1/6Kudos: 36

Summary: Merlin and Arthur had always been like some old married couple, or so everyone said. But this was going a tad too far. What the hell did Merlin mean he had just as much a right to their shared assets as Arthur did? Since when did they share anything!Or the 5 things that Arthur is forced to “share” with Merlin, and the one thing he keeps all to himself. Just kidding, the 5 times Merlin steals Arthur’s shit and the one thing he can’t steal.

entry.title: Shared Affections
entry.summary:
Author: Hades_Lord_of_the_Dead

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,758Chapters: 6/6Kudos: 66

Summary: King Arthur brings magic back to Camelot and the Triple Goddess revives Sir Lancelot as a reward. Lancelot’s return sparks old feelings for Gwen and Arthur wonders if relationships might not be as rigid as he was raised to believe...In other words, Gwen and Arthur try polyamory, prompting Arthur into a journey of self-discovery. Gwen/Arthur; Gwen/Lancelot; Eventual Arthur/MerlinNo smut I'm afraid (but keep an eye out for the sequel...)

entry.title: The Heart of the Kingdom
entry.summary:
Author: juliairian

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 85,193Chapters: 16/37Kudos: 83

Summary: "Camelot had to be different to suddenly accommodate such a person as Merlin. He could never have existed in Camelot before, and therefore, Camelot changed. There had to be shadows and secrets to keep Merlin safe, mysteries to bring them together, and silences for all the words they never said to each other." Merlin saves one man from Uther's pyre and never becomes Arthur's servant - instead, the two unlikely friends must defend Camelot and over time learn the truth about magic and what happened before the Purge. Will magic in Camelot gain two powerful protectors despite the world trying to keep them apart?

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Wise man says, only fool rush in
entry.summary:
Author: gloriask

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,548Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 97

Summary: “You must have it the worst,” Daegal added, eyeing him with newfound sympathy. “You’re with him all the time.” Merlin made a small, noncommittal sound. “I mean, the hours alone,” Daegal continued. “And the pressure. And the—everything. You’re basically on call 24/7, right?” “Something like that,” Merlin’s shoulders shook slightly.

entry.title: The Squires of Camelot
entry.summary:
Author: Basched

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,800Chapters: 168/?Kudos: 143

Summary: In a land of myth and a time of magic, destiny rests on the shoulders of five young boys, along with a lot of grueling work, dedication, and long hours of cleaning up after the new knights. They are the Squires of Camelot.

entry.title: Soldier, Servant, Poet, King
entry.summary:
Author: Grammar_Beane

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 43,016Chapters: 21/24Kudos: 196

Summary: Arthur and Merlin were just going on a hunting trip. It was meant to be a nice, easy trip through the woods around Camelot. It ended with them being chased by an unknown monster into an unknown cave, stepping out into an unknown world. Maybe the weird bard and the magic monster hunter they found in the woods could help? Jaskier and Geralt were on their way north for the winter—Jaskier to Oxenfurt, Geralt to Kaer Morhen. But they were still a ways away when two odd men claiming to be from a place called “Camelot” stumbled into them. Geralt immediately learned Merlin has magic, and Jaskier could see the chemistry between the pair from a mile away. Arthur wanted to get back to Camelot.Merlin wanted to get back to Camelot, and stay alive while his magic seemed intent on acting bizarre.Geralt wanted to travel with Jaskier.Jaskier wanted to travel with Geralt, and get those two idiots to confess everything. It took some time, but they all got what they wanted. More or less.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Kill Your Darlings➳Merthur
entry.summary:
Author: asomina

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,863Chapters: 9/12Kudos: 234

Summary: There's something off about the way Merlin is looking at Arthur. He's nervous, awkward and instead of hiding his suspicious behaviour with insults or jokes. He drowns Arthur's concerns with kisses. or.... In which Mordred disguises himself as Merlin to destroy Camelot from the inside. However, he mistakenly believes Merlin and Arthur are in an extremely intense, romantic relationship. Maybe he embodies Merlin a little too well.   Aka the body swap AU no one asked for.Featuring band favourites: Flirty Gwaine, lesbian awaking Morgana, himbo Arthur, Mordred being confused and Merlin finally getting the day off he needed.

entry.title: Well, Technically
entry.summary:
Author: bandhoez9194

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,013Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 87

Summary: "You seemed as if you were hiding something during Father's interrogation," Arthur remarked quietly, fingers gently prodding at a bruise. Merlin didnt open his mouth, eyes focused on a spot above Arthur's head. "Merlin, did you manage to lie to Father about something?" Merlin swallowed, the compulsion pushing at him. "Technically, I didn't say a lie," he said carefully and Arthur paused, frowning at him. "What do you mean technically?" He demanded. ~~~~~~ Someone tells Uther they saw Merlin doing magic, so he doses him with a truth serum. Merlin might have learned something from the Dragon after all

entry.title: True of Heart
entry.summary:
Author: SprinkleHatesEverything

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,269Chapters: 5/6Kudos: 22

Summary: "Since that day, magic began to occupy his thoughts more and more. Magic lived on in such a mundane way that Lancelot had a difficult time imagining who exactly it was that Uther had been fighting. Magic was everywhere, magic was in the heart of Camelot itself. Uther was definitely turning in his grave." OR Lancelot Du Lac is a selfless and honourable man with a strong sense of morality. He became a knight to defend and help the people around him. But when he starts to realise that he is complicit to a great injustice, as a feeling of helplessness starts to grip his heart as he watches his magical friend sacrifice himself from the shadows, he realises something needs to change

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Merlin’s Purrfect Holiday
entry.summary:
Author: victorian_eve

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,716Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 42

Summary: Merlin felt pain surge through his body, his limbs felt as if they were shrinking in on themselves and mutating. He could feel his face twisting into something none human. Long black hair grew from his skin as he watched the world getting bigger and bigger and felt himself drown in a pile of fabrics that he slowly realised were his own clothes. The cold ion cuffs around his writs dropped with a thud becoming too big for him. Merlin looked down to see what should be hands were instead small furry black paws. Merlin let out a horrified yelp, but only became more horrified when what actually came out of his mouth was… “Meow” Or Morgause found out that Merlin is Emrys and decides to take revenge by turning Merlin into a Cat. Arthur is going mad without Merlin and Camelot is realising just how much work Merlin does. Meanwhile Merlin is finally getting a break and lounging around Camelot as a Cat and yet still manages to protect Arthur and Camelot from their enemies.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Merlin & Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)

entry.title: somewhere beyond the sea (my lover stands on golden sands)
entry.summary:
Author: highfunctioningclotpole

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,376Chapters: 4/7Kudos: 14

Summary: Merlin has always felt out of place beneath the sea, and far too drawn to the golden-haired king who walks the shoreline. Desperate to be part of Arthur’s world, he makes a dangerous bargain with a sea witch. Arthur brings the mysterious, silent stranger into his castle, never expecting the quiet man from the beach to upend his heart. As their bond deepens, Merlin carries a secret heavy enough to drown them both. Because the sea that Arthur fears is the home Merlin left behind.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Forbidden
entry.summary:
Author: Ahgase2002

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,536Chapters: 4/7Kudos: 130

Summary: "Your manservant is quite devoted" Mithian observed, following his gaze. Arthur snapped his attention back to her. "Merlin? He's adequate. When he's not being impossibly clumsy or insolent." "Strange. I've heard others speak of him with great admiration. They say he's fiercely loyal, I even heard that he's saved your life on multiple occasions." "He exaggerates his own importance." Mithian tilted her head, studying him. "You watch him quite frequently." Prince Arthur is in love with his manservant.
